diagrams.title: Search Tree - BFS vs DFS
diagrams.description: Comparison of BFS and DFS node expansion order in a tree
elements: BFS: Expands level by level left to right
diagrams.purpose: Understand how different search algorithms explore the state space

diagrams.title: A* Search Evaluation Function
diagrams.description: Visualization of f(n) = g(n) + h(n) components
elements: g(n): Cost from start to current node (shown as distance traveled)
h(n): Heuristic estimate to goal (shown as straight-line distance)
f(n): Total estimated cost (sum of both)
diagrams.purpose: Clarify the components of A* evaluation function

diagrams.title: Minimax Game Tree
diagrams.description: Two-player game tree showing MAX and MIN levels
elements: Alpha and Beta values at each node
diagrams.purpose: Understand minimax algorithm and alpha-beta pruning concept

diagrams.title: Alpha-Beta Pruning Example
diagrams.description: Tree showing which branches get pruned
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how alpha-beta reduces search complexity

diagrams.title: Hill Climbing Local vs Global Maximum
diagrams.purpose: Understand limitations of local search algorithms

visuals.title: Searching For Solutions
visuals.description: Visual diagram for searching for solutions
